Privacy

Privacy Blur Chrome Extension — Hide Sensitive Content

Add to Chrome — FreeAll Features

What It Does

OneBuddy's Privacy Blur lets you click or drag to blur any element on any webpage. Choose from 5 blur styles to hide sensitive content before screen sharing, presentations, or simply for personal privacy. Blurred areas are persistent — they re-apply automatically when you revisit the page.

Why It's Better Than Standalone Extensions

No other Chrome extension offers persistent, multi-style privacy blur that re-applies on page revisits. Standalone blur tools are single-purpose. OneBuddy combines privacy blur with ad blocking, tracker blocking, browser lock, and complete productivity tools.

Feature Breakdown

Click-to-Blur

Click any element on a page to instantly blur it — text, images, or entire sections.

Drag-to-Blur

Drag to create a blur rectangle over any area of the page.

5 Blur Styles

Choose from different blur effects to match your needs and aesthetic preference.

Persistent Blurs

Blurred areas re-apply automatically when you revisit the same page.

Easy Toggle

Toggle all blurs on/off with a single click in the side panel.

Per-Site Management

Manage blur regions per website — view, edit, or remove blurs anytime.

Key Benefits

Screen share safely without exposing sensitive data
Blur financial information, personal details, or private messages
Persistent blurs save time — no need to re-blur on repeat visits
5 blur styles for different contexts and preferences
Unique feature not found in other chrome extensions

Who Uses This

Remote workers blurring Slack messages before screen sharing
Presenters hiding browser bookmarks and sensitive tabs
Content creators blurring personal data in recording/screenshots
Journalists protecting source identities during research
Anyone presenting their screen to colleagues or clients

Frequently Asked Questions

How does Privacy Blur work?
Click any element to blur it, or drag to create a blur rectangle. Choose from 5 blur styles. Blurred areas persist and re-apply when you revisit the page.
Do blurs persist across browser sessions?
Yes. Blurred areas are saved per-page and automatically re-apply when you revisit the same URL.
Can I temporarily remove all blurs?
Yes. Toggle all blurs on/off with a single click in the OneBuddy side panel.
Is this available in any other extension?
Persistent, multi-style privacy blur with per-page management is unique to OneBuddy.

Try It Free — No Account Needed

Add OneBuddy to Chrome and access this feature plus 14 more tools — completely free.
